 title: Replace title= with shadcn Tooltip in avatar.tsx
 ---
 ## What

Replace HTML `title=` on both avatar variants with shadcn Tooltip.

**MANDATORY: TDD — write/update tests FIRST (RED), then implement (GREEN).**

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/avatar.test.tsx` — update selectors from `title` to `aria-label`, add tooltip hover assertion FIRST
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/avatar.tsx` — replace `title=` with Tooltip + `aria-label`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests updated FIRST (RED), then code changed (GREEN)
- [ ] Styled tooltip with actor name on hover
- [ ] No HTML `title=` in avatar.tsx
- [ ] Avatar layout not disrupted

## Tests
- [ ] Test written/updated FIRST (RED)
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run avatar` — all pass"
\ No newline at end of file
